description_long: This house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with dark shingles and a light-colored exterior, surrounded by a fenced yard with several trees and shrubs. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by large windows and a double garage. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area and outdoor seating. Multiple rooflines and varying window sizes give the structure a modern yet traditional suburban appearance. The property is enclosed by a solid fence, providing privacy and a defined boundary. Architectural details such as dormer windows, a mix of siding textures, and landscaped elements enhance its curb appeal.
description: A large, modern suburban house with a multi-gabled dark roof, light exterior, and landscaped fenced yard. Features include a covered entry porch, double garage, and spacious backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, covered porch, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, large windows, and fenced garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, side yard, and the continuation of the fence and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by large windows and decorative landscaping
